description_long: This windmill features a highly irregular and abstract design, with a combination of angular and slanted surfaces covered in a golden-brown material that resembles weathered wood or straw. The structure includes a prominent, vertically-oriented blade assembly with metallic, ribbed textures, and several asymmetrical panels and supports, some of which are decorated with colorful, mosaic-like patterns. The base appears partially enclosed, with a patchwork of blue, brown, and metallic elements, and there are visible gaps and broken sections suggesting age or artistic intent. The windmill's blades are not traditional; instead, they are geometric and integrated into the structure, with one large, ribbed blade standing out. The overall form is sculptural, with a mix of hard, rough surfaces and intricate, decorative details. This object would serve as a striking landmark or art installation in an urban park or plaza.
description: An abstract, golden-brown windmill with a ribbed vertical blade and colorful mosaic panels, featuring an irregular, sculptural form and weathered textures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main ribbed blade, slanted roof, and colorful mosaic paneling with visible structural supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, golden-brown structure and the angular, protruding blade, with less visible mosaic detail.
description_view_2: Rear angled view reveals the open, broken sections and the back of the mosaic panel, emphasizing the irregular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the slanted roof, ribbed blade, and a large, colorful panel at the base, with less visible structural detail.
